back_translation: A song. A Psalm of David.
My heart is steadfast, O God; I will sing and make music with all my being.
Awake, O harp and lyre! I will awaken the dawn.
I will praise You, O LORD, among the nations; I will sing Your praises among the peoples.
For Your loving devotion is greater than the heavens, and Your faithfulness reaches to the clouds.
Be exalted, O God, above the heavens; may Your glory be over all the earth.
That Your beloved may be delivered, answer us and save us with Your right hand.
God has spoken in His holiness: 'I will exult; I will divide Shechem and apportion the Valley of Succoth.'
'Gilead is Mine, and Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim is the helmet for My head, Judah My scepter.'
'Moab is My washbasin; over Edom I cast My sandal; over Philistia I shout in triumph.'
Who will bring me to the fortified city? Who will lead me to Edom?
Have You not rejected us, O God? You no longer march out with our armies.
Give us help against the enemy, for the help of man is worthless.
With God we will gain the victory, and He will trample our enemies.
